{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Manager - Flexible Packaging",
  "description": "MarbleClear Limited is a full service Human Resources Management firm committed to optimizing the value of HR within your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Manager&nbsp;- Flexible Packaging

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Achieve growth and hit sales targets through strategic sales and marketing execution.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies to drive market penetration and revenue growth.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers by understanding their operational and technical needs.
	Present periodic sales, revenue, expense reports, and realistic forecasts to management.
	Identify emerging markets, customer segments, and new business opportunities.
	Ensure timely collection of outstanding receivables in line with company credit policies.
	Conduct accurate sales forecasting using customer data, historical trends, and market intelligence.
	Maintain optimal sales volume, product mix, and pricing strategies based on market conditions and competitor positioning.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and ensure high levels of satisfaction.
	Provide technical advisory support to customers on product specifications and packaging solutions.
	Stay updated on product innovations, economic indicators, and competitive activities.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in the flexible packaging or converting industry, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Strong technical and commercial understanding of laminates, films, and related flexible packaging products.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of market dynamics, competitor analysis, and industry trends.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong analytical and sales forecasting capability.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;job@marble.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-26",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Sales & Marketing Manager - Flexible Packaging Job at MarbleClear Limited




        
    

        
        MarbleClear Limited is a full service Human Resources Management firm committed to optimizing the value of HR within your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Manager - Flexible Packaging

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Achieve growth and hit sales targets through strategic sales and marketing execution.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies to drive market penetration and revenue growth.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers by understanding their operational and technical needs.
	Present periodic sales, revenue, expense reports, and realistic forecasts to management.
	Identify emerging markets, customer segments, and new business opportunities.
	Ensure timely collection of outstanding receivables in line with company credit policies.
	Conduct accurate sales forecasting using customer data, historical trends, and market intelligence.
	Maintain optimal sales volume, product mix, and pricing strategies based on market conditions and competitor positioning.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and ensure high levels of satisfaction.
	Provide technical advisory support to customers on product specifications and packaging solutions.
	Stay updated on product innovations, economic indicators, and competitive activities.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in the flexible packaging or converting industry, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Strong technical and commercial understanding of laminates, films, and related flexible packaging products.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of market dynamics, competitor analysis, and industry trends.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong analytical and sales forecasting capability.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant / Floor Manager",
  "description": "PSO Consults&nbsp;Limited - Our client, a cafeteria, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant / Floor Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job&nbsp;Summary


	Our client is currently seeking an experienced Restuarant / Floor Manager to lead our back-of-house operations.
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily operations within the cafeteria which includes monitoring vendors, overseeing cleaners, maintaining order, and ensuring hygiene compliance during service hours.


Job Description


	The Restaurant / Floor Manager is responsible for overseeing daily operations within a shared cafeteria environment.
	This role focuses on coordinating vendors, maintaining order, enforcing hygiene standards, and ensuring a smooth and efficient service flow.
	This is a supervisory role that emphasizes operations, compliance, and coordination, rather than direct food preparation.


Key Responsibilities


	Resume duty at 6:00 AM to oversee opening activities.
	Conduct daily pre-opening inspections of kitchen and service areas.
	Supervise vendor setup and ensure compliance with assigned zones.
	Coordinate vendor activities to maintain smooth operational flow.
	Enforce proper storage practices and prevent cross-usage between vendors.
	Monitor cleanliness, hygiene, and sanitation standards across all areas.
	Ensure washing stations are efficiently utilized and not congested.
	Maintain clean, dry, and obstruction-free walkways and service areas.
	Identify and address expired or improperly stored food items.
	Supervise cleaning staff and ensure adherence to cleaning schedules.
	Perform routine checks during service hours to maintain order.
	Handle vendor coordination and resolve minor conflicts where necessary.
	Conduct end-of-day inspections before closing.
	Maintain accurate daily records of operations and compliance in logbooks.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any relevant field.
	Previous experience in hospitality, restaurant operations, or facility supervision.
	Strong understanding of hygiene and food safety standards.
	Good coordination and people-management skills.
	Ability to enforce rules firmly and diplomatically.
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Good verbal communication skills.
	Willingness to resume early and work in a structured environment.
	Preferred Qualifications (Added Advantage).
	Experience managing multi-vendor or shared spaces.
	Basic conflict resolution skills.
	Familiarity with daily reporting and operational logbooks.


Salary
N250,000 monthly.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-31",

Restaurant / Floor Manager Job at PSO Consults Limited




        
    

        
        PSO Consults Limited - Our client, a cafeteria, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant / Floor Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is currently seeking an experienced Restuarant / Floor Manager to lead our back-of-house operations.
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily operations within the cafeteria which includes monitoring vendors, overseeing cleaners, maintaining order, and ensuring hygiene compliance during service hours.


Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Restaurant / Floor Manager is responsible for overseeing daily operations within a shared cafeteria environment.
	This role focuses on coordinating vendors, maintaining order, enforcing hygiene standards, and ensuring a smooth and efficient service flow.
	This is a supervisory role that emphasizes operations, compliance, and coordination, rather than direct food preparation.


Key Responsibilities


	Resume duty at 6:00 AM to oversee opening activities.
	Conduct daily pre-opening inspections of kitchen and service areas.
	Supervise vendor setup and ensure compliance with assigned zones.
	Coordinate vendor activities to maintain smooth operational flow.
	Enforce proper storage practices and prevent cross-usage between vendors.
	Monitor cleanliness, hygiene, and sanitation standards across all areas.
	Ensure washing stations are efficiently utilized and not congested.
	Maintain clean, dry, and obstruction-free walkways and service areas.
	Identify and address expired or improperly stored food items.
	Supervise cleaning staff and ensure adherence to cleaning schedules.
	Perform routine checks during service hours to maintain order.
	Handle vendor coordination and resolve minor conflicts where necessary.
	Conduct end-of-day inspections before closing.
	Maintain accurate daily records of operations and compliance in logbooks.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in any relevant field.
	Previous experience in hospitality, restaurant operations, or facility supervision.
	Strong understanding of hygiene and food safety standards.
	Good coordination and people-management skills.
	Ability to enforce rules firmly and diplomatically.
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Good verbal communication skills.
	Willingness to resume early and work in a structured environment.
	Preferred Qualifications (Added Advantage).
	Experience managing multi-vendor or shared spaces.
	Basic conflict resolution skills.
	Familiarity with daily reporting and operational logbooks.


Salary
N250,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.

Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa.&nbsp;More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company&rsquo;s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Assistant (Female)
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A female financial assistant with a strong academic background in finance or accounting from a recognized university. Applicants must have at least three years of relevant work experience in financial management or related fields.
	The role involves assisting with daily financial operations, handling cashier duties, managing warehouse data statistics, and supporting the finance manager in preparing reports and maintaining accurate records.
	Candidates should be familiar with financial systems and procedures, demonstrate excellent analytical skills, and maintain a meticulous approach to data accuracy.
	Strong responsibility, effective communication, and teamwork abilities are essential, along with the capacity to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment while upholding professionalism.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Financial Assistant (Female) Job at Viju Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Assistant (Female)
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A female financial assistant with a strong academic background in finance or accounting from a recognized university. Applicants must have at least three years of relevant work experience in financial management or related fields.
	The role involves assisting with daily financial operations, handling cashier duties, managing warehouse data statistics, and supporting the finance manager in preparing reports and maintaining accurate records.
	Candidates should be familiar with financial systems and procedures, demonstrate excellent analytical skills, and maintain a meticulous approach to data accuracy.
	Strong responsibility, effective communication, and teamwork abilities are essential, along with the capacity to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment while upholding professionalism.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Farm Officer",
  "description": "We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria&#39;s livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Farm Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Oversee and coordinate all daily farm operations, ensuring smooth workflow and efficiency
	Supervise and manage a workforce of over 200 staff, ensuring tasks are properly assigned and executed
	Enforce strict compliance with biosecurity protocols to prevent disease outbreaks
	Implement and monitor adherence to standard operating procedures (SOPs)
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date records on production, mortality, feed usage, medication, and staff activities
	Manage and analyze farm data to support decision-making and improve productivity
	Monitor animal health and coordinate with veterinarians for preventive and corrective actions
	Ensure proper sanitation, hygiene, and waste management practices are maintained at all times
	Oversee inventory management of feed, drugs, and other farm supplies
	Ensure farm equipment is properly maintained and utilized efficiently
	Train, guide, and discipline staff to ensure high performance and compliance with farm standards
	Prepare regular reports for management on farm performance and operations.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor of Agriculture (B.Agirc) Degree with 2-5 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;oawolesi@animalcare-ng.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Application for Farm Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Farm Officer Job at Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria's livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Farm Officer

Job Location: Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee and coordinate all daily farm operations, ensuring smooth workflow and efficiency
	Supervise and manage a workforce of over 200 staff, ensuring tasks are properly assigned and executed
	Enforce strict compliance with biosecurity protocols to prevent disease outbreaks
	Implement and monitor adherence to standard operating procedures (SOPs)
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date records on production, mortality, feed usage, medication, and staff activities
	Manage and analyze farm data to support decision-making and improve productivity
	Monitor animal health and coordinate with veterinarians for preventive and corrective actions
	Ensure proper sanitation, hygiene, and waste management practices are maintained at all times
	Oversee inventory management of feed, drugs, and other farm supplies
	Ensure farm equipment is properly maintained and utilized efficiently
	Train, guide, and discipline staff to ensure high performance and compliance with farm standards
	Prepare regular reports for management on farm performance and operations.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor of Agriculture (B.Agirc) Degree with 2-5 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Application for Farm Officer” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Data Analyst",
  "description": "Catalyst Path Consulting is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Gujeni, Kaduna
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Data Analyst with 3&ndash;6 years of professional experience.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for interpreting data, analyzing results, and providing actionable insights to support business decision-making.
	You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify trends, optimize processes, and drive strategic initiatives.


Key Responsibilities


	Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets from multiple sources.
	Develop dashboards, reports, and visualizations to communicate insights effectively.
	Identify patterns, trends, and correlations in complex data sets.
	Work closely with business stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver data-driven solutions.
	Perform statistical analysis and predictive modeling to support forecasting and strategic planning.
	Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance with organizational standards.
	Automate data processes and improve reporting efficiency.
	Present findings and recommendations to senior management in a clear and concise manner.


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or related field.
	3&ndash;6 years of proven experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar role.
	Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases.
	Hands-on experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Qlik).
	Proficiency in Excel (advanced functions, pivot tables, macros).
	Knowledge of statistical techniques and tools (e.g., R, Python, SAS).
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
	Familiarity with ETL processes and data warehousing concepts.
	Exposure to machine learning techniques and predictive analytics.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional growth and skill development.
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.
	Chance to make a real impact through data-driven decision-making.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;isaac.samuel@anrml.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Female candidates are strongly encouraged to apply.",

  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Catalyst Path Consulting"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {

Data Analyst Job at Catalyst Path Consulting




        
    

        
        Catalyst Path Consulting is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location: Gujeni, Kaduna
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Data Analyst with 3–6 years of professional experience.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for interpreting data, analyzing results, and providing actionable insights to support business decision-making.
	You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify trends, optimize processes, and drive strategic initiatives.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets from multiple sources.
	Develop dashboards, reports, and visualizations to communicate insights effectively.
	Identify patterns, trends, and correlations in complex data sets.
	Work closely with business stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver data-driven solutions.
	Perform statistical analysis and predictive modeling to support forecasting and strategic planning.
	Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance with organizational standards.
	Automate data processes and improve reporting efficiency.
	Present findings and recommendations to senior management in a clear and concise manner.


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or related field.
	3–6 years of proven experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar role.
	Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases.
	Hands-on experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Qlik).
	Proficiency in Excel (advanced functions, pivot tables, macros).
	Knowledge of statistical techniques and tools (e.g., R, Python, SAS).
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
	Familiarity with ETL processes and data warehousing concepts.
	Exposure to machine learning techniques and predictive analytics.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional growth and skill development.
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.
	Chance to make a real impact through data-driven decision-making.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the email.

Note: Female candidates are strongly encouraged to apply.
